name: commandline
description: Command Line — run shell commands on the local machine
author: sapphire

settings.label: Output Limit (chars)
settings.help: Maximum characters returned from command output

settings.label: Max Timeout (seconds)
settings.help: Maximum allowed timeout for any command

settings.label: Command Blacklist
settings.default:
rm -rf /
rm -rf /*
--no-preserve-root
mkfs
dd if=/dev
:(){ :|:& };:
> /dev/sda
chmod -R 777 /
init 0
init 6
settings.help: Blocked patterns, one per line. Checked as regex against commands.
